LanguageData.ED_InflationDesc: If enabled, all prices in the world will rise or fall depending on the total silver supply. If disabled, prices still change but only based on local supply and demand.
LanguageData.ED_GoldStandardDesc: Stops passive silver printing by factions and freezes the inflation baseline. The economy becomes a Zero-Sum game: if the player extracts all silver from the world, factions will live in eternal deflation and resort to bartering.
LanguageData.ED_PriceUpdateFactorDesc: How fast prices adjust to surplus or deficit per update cycle. 100% = instant, 1% = very slow (smooth).
LanguageData.ED_InflationUpdateFactorDesc: How fast global inflation adjusts to changes in the total silver supply per cycle. Helps prevent sudden price shocks after large player trades.
LanguageData.ED_HomeostasisDesc: How fast the baseline economy digests new volumes of silver (GDP indexing). Lower values mean the world takes longer to recover from macroeconomic shocks.
LanguageData.ED_EnableNotificationsDesc: Enable or disable letters and messages (births, maturation, faction events, etc.). Only technical logs remain if disabled.
LanguageData.ED_EnableCivilianSpawningDesc: If enabled, children and elderly pawns will appear in faction settlements on the map, reflecting the virtual demographic stats. This makes base raids feel more populated and realistic.
LanguageData.ED_EnableLogsDesc: Record population actions to FinitePopulation.log and the console.
LanguageData.ED_ExpansionLetterText: Due to an excess of resources and people ({0}/{1}), the faction {2} has founded a new settlement: {3}.\n\nResources spent: {4}
LanguageData.ED_DefectionLog: [E&D] A citizen left {0} due to low standard of living ({1:F1} sil/pop) and joined {2}
LanguageData.ED_FactionRuinedText: The last settlement of faction {0} ({1}) has been abandoned. The remaining {2} people could not maintain order and became vagrants.
LanguageData.ED_SettlementAbandonedText: The faction {0} has left {1} due to a lack of people. The garrison retreated to the remaining bases, losing {2} people.
LanguageData.ED_RebirthText: Vagrants of {0} (Pop.: {1}) have found a suitable location and founded a settlement: {2}.
LanguageData.ED_TerritoryLossText: The faction {0} lost a settlement in the course of a war. {1} people were killed or captured.
LanguageData.ED_LastBaseLossText: The faction {0} has lost its last settlement. The remaining {1} people have dispersed.
LanguageData.ED_VagrantsMessage: {0} {1} ({2} people) are now wandering the world without a home.
LanguageData.ED_FactionExtinctionText: The last inhabitant of faction {0} died. Their settlements have become empty.
LanguageData.ED_FactionDefeatText: The history of {0} is over. The last survivors have vanished.
LanguageData.ED_Log_Export: <color=#77ffff>[E&D] EXPORT:</color> {0} ({1}) sold resources to {2} for {3} silver.
LanguageData.ED_Log_Purchase: <color=#77ffff>[E&D] PURCHASE:</color> {0} bought surplus from savages {1} for {2} silver.
LanguageData.ED_Log_InflationReset: [E&D] Inflation baseline reset (anomaly detected from old saves).
LanguageData.ED_UI_TabDesc: Global population and world economy statistics.
LanguageData.ED_Log_RaidBankruptApplied: [E&D] Faction {0} went bankrupt sending a raid. Stockpile cleared.
LanguageData.ED_Log_PawnDeathPregnancy: Faction {0} lost a child due to the death/loss of a pregnant pawn ({1}).
LanguageData.ED_Log_NewFactionAdded: New faction {0} added {1}$ to the baseline silver limit.
LanguageData.ED_Log_RoleReset: Fix: Faction {0} in space had role {1}. Recalculated to: {2}.
LanguageData.ED_Log_AbandonedCheck: Monthly check for abandoned production projects...
LanguageData.ED_Log_SettlementDestroyedReduction: Base {0} destroyed. Global stockpile of {1} reduced by 1/{2} share.
LanguageData.ED_Log_TraderArrivalReplacement: Caravan from {0} arrived. Stock successfully substituted at spawn.
LanguageData.ED_Log_MapLootDebug: Loot points found: Storage={0}, Dining={1}, Bedroom={2}. Total items: {3}
LanguageData.ED_Log_RecoveryMapRemoval: Map {0} removed. Inhabitants recovered: {1} items, {2} silver.
LanguageData.ED_Log_PawnDepartedMap: Pawn from {0} left the map. Items saved to virtual stockpile.
LanguageData.ED_Log_Birth: [E&D] A child was born to faction {0} ({1} adults).
LanguageData.ED_Log_ExpansionSettle: [E&D] {0} is expanding! New settlement {1} founded (pop replenished to {2}).
LanguageData.ED_Log_TraderNullOrPlayer: [E&D] Trader is null or player, skipping.
LanguageData.ED_Log_TraderIsCaravan: [E&D] This is a caravan, skipping (they carry goods).
LanguageData.ED_Log_RecoverSuccess: [E&D] Success! Returned: {0} types, {1} silver. Stock after: {2}, Silver: {3}
LanguageData.ED_Log_OwnerNotFound: [E&D] owner is empty or not found! owner == null: {0}
LanguageData.ED_Log_EconomyPathChosenBulk: [E&D Economy] Bulk assignment for {0}: path chosen: {1}
LanguageData.ED_Log_ItemGenerationError: [E&D] Error generating item {0}: {1}. Replaced with silver.
LanguageData.ED_Log_ItemProcessError: [E&D] Failed to create or process item {0}: {1}
